mapper.select: select count(*) from tbl_follow where following_id = #{memberId}
select count(*) from tbl_estimation where receiver_id = #{memberId} and status = 'approve'
select count(*) from tbl_estimation where receiver_id = #{memberId}
select avg(extract(epoch from (updated_datetime - created_datetime)) / 3600.0) from tbl_estimation where receiver_id = #{memberId} and status != 'requesting'
select count(*) from tbl_post_like pl join tbl_post p on p.id = pl.post_id where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active'
select count(*) from tbl_bookmark b join tbl_post p on p.id = b.post_id where p.member_id = #{memberId} and p.post_status = 'active'

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_follow where following_id = #{memberId} and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_follow where following_id = #{memberId} and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_estimation where receiver_id = #{memberId} and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_estimation where receiver_id = #{memberId} and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label

select to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') as label, sum(case when status = 'approve' then 1 else 0 end) as value, sum(case when status = 'reject' then 1 else 0 end) as secondaryValue from tbl_estimation where receiver_id = #{memberId} and created_datetime >= #{startAt} and created_datetime < #{endAt} group by to_char(created_datetime, 'YYYY-MM') order by label

select coalesce(c.category_name, '미분류') as label, count(*) as value from tbl_estimation e left join tbl_post_product pp on pp.id = e.product_id left join tbl_category c on c.id = pp.product_category_id where e.receiver_id = #{memberId} group by coalesce(c.category_name, '미분류') order by value desc, label asc limit 6

select case when trim(coalesce(m.member_region, '')) = '' then 'Unknown' else 'South Korea' end as label, count(*) as value from tbl_estimation e join tbl_member m on m.id = e.requester_id where e.receiver_id = #{memberId} group by 1 order by value desc, label asc
